paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And in the seventh month, on the first day of the month, ye shall have a holy convocation; ye shall do no servile work: it is a day of blowing of trumpets unto you.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And ye shall offer a burnt-offering for a sweet savor unto Jehovah: one young bullock, one ram, seven he-lambs a year old without blemish;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and their meal-offering, fine flour mingled with oil, three tenth parts for the bullock, two tenth parts for the ram,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and one tenth part for every lamb of the seven lambs;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and one he-goat for a sin-offering, to make atonement for you;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: besides the burnt-offering of the new moon, and the meal-offering thereof, and the continual burnt-offering and the meal-offering thereof, and their drink-offerings, according unto their ordinance, for a sweet savor, an offering made by fire unto Jehovah.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And on the tenth day of this seventh month ye shall have a holy convocation; and ye shall afflict your souls: ye shall do no manner of work;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: but ye shall offer a burnt-offering unto Jehovah for a sweet savor: one young bullock, one ram, seven he-lambs a year old; they shall be unto you without blemish;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and their meal-offering, fine flour mingled with oil, three tenth parts for the bullock, two tenth parts for the one ram,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: a tenth part for every lamb of the seven lambs:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one he-goat for a sin-offering; besides the sin-offering of atonement, and the continual burnt-offering, and the meal-offering thereof, and their drink-offerings.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And on the fifteenth day of the seventh month ye shall have a holy convocation; ye shall do no servile work, and ye shall keep a feast unto Jehovah seven days:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and ye shall offer a burnt-offering, an offering made by fire, of a sweet savor unto Jehovah; thirteen young bullocks, two rams, fourteen he-lambs a year old; they shall be without blemish;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and their meal-offering, fine flour mingled with oil, three tenth parts for every bullock of the thirteen bullocks, two tenth parts for each ram of the two rams,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and a tenth part for every lamb of the fourteen lambs;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and one he-goat for a sin-offering, besides the continual burnt-offering, the meal-offering thereof, and the drink-offering thereof.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And on the second day [ye shall offer] twelve young bullocks, two rams, fourteen he-lambs a year old without blemish;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and their meal-offering and their drink-offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, according to their number, after the ordinance;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and one he-goat for a sin-offering; besides the continual burnt-offering, and the meal-offering thereof, and their drink-offerings.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And on the third day eleven bullocks, two rams, fourteen he-lambs a year old without blemish;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and their meal-offering and their drink-offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, according to their number, after the ordinance;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and one he-goat for a sin-offering; besides the continual burnt-offering, and the meal-offering thereof, and the drink-offering thereof.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And on the fourth day ten bullocks, two rams, fourteen he-lambs a year old without blemish;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: their meal-offering and their drink-offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, according to their number, after the ordinance;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and one he-goat for a sin-offering; besides the continual burnt-offering, the meal-offering thereof, and the drink-offering thereof.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And on the fifth day nine bullocks, two rams, fourteen he-lambs a year old without blemish;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and their meal-offering and their drink-offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, according to their number, after the ordinance;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and one he-goat for a sin-offering, besides the continual burnt-offering, and the meal-offering thereof, and the drink-offering thereof.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And on the sixth day eight bullocks, two rams, fourteen he-lambs a year old without blemish;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and their meal-offering and their drink-offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, according to their number, after the ordinance;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and one he-goat for a sin-offering; besides the continual burnt-offering, the meal-offering thereof, and the drink-offerings thereof.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And on the seventh day seven bullocks, two rams, fourteen he-lambs a year old without blemish;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and their meal-offering and their drink-offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, according to their number, after the ordinance;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and one he-goat for a sin-offering; besides the continual burnt-offering, the meal-offering thereof, and the drink-offering thereof.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: On the eighth day ye shall have a solemn assembly: ye shall do no servile work;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: but ye shall offer a burnt-offering, an offering made by fire, of a sweet savor unto Jehovah: one bullock, one ram, seven he-lambs a year old without blemish;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: their meal-offering and their drink-offerings for the bullock, for the ram, and for the lambs, shall be according to their number, after the ordinance:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and one he-goat for a sin-offering, besides the continual burnt-offering, and the meal-offering thereof, and the drink-offering thereof.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: These ye shall offer unto Jehovah in your set feasts, besides your vows, and your freewill-offerings, for your burnt-offerings, and for your meal-offerings, and for your drink-offerings, and for your peace-offerings.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Moses told the children of Israel according to all that Jehovah commanded Moses.
